placeholder.name: dbConnection
placeholder.sslCa: Paste CA certificate PEM content here
placeholder.sslCert: Paste client certificate PEM content here
placeholder.sslKey: Paste client key PEM content here

title.max: Maximum number of physical database connections that this connection pool can contain.
title.min: Minimum number of physical database connections that this connection pool can contain.
title.sslmode: PostgreSQL SSL/TLS mode. 'verify-ca' and 'verify-full' require certificates in the Security tab.
title.sslDeprecated: Migrated to sslmode: require. Use the SSL Mode dropdown below.
title.databaseUrl: PostgreSQL connection string. Overrides host/port/database when set.
title.statementTimeout: Default query timeout in milliseconds. 0 = no timeout. Can be overridden per-node.
title.namedParams: Enable named parameters via msg.params. Keys mapped to positional $1, $2, ... in query order. Mustache templating renders first, then named params bind.
title.queryTimeout: Per-node query timeout in milliseconds. 0 = no timeout. Overrides the pool statement_timeout for this node.
title.mapNumeric: Convert PostgreSQL numeric type to JavaScript number. Warning: loss of precision for very large values.
title.mapTimestamptz: Convert PostgreSQL timestamptz to ISO 8601 date string. Off: returns Date object.
title.parseJsonb: Auto-parse PostgreSQL jsonb columns to JavaScript objects. Off: returns raw jsonb string.
title.transactionMode: Execute msg.payload as an array of {query, params, output} entries atomically within a single transaction (BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK). First output:true wins.
title.parseNotifyJson: Auto-parse NOTIFY payload as JSON. Falls back to raw string on parse failure. Default on.
